title: manifest: Make sure manifest `rm` only removes manifests not referenced images.
body:
Following PR makes sure that `buildah manifest rm <list>` only removes
the manifest list not referenced images.

Depends on: https://github.com/containers/common/pull/753

comments.body: I need to change `flouthoc/common` to `c/common` in **go.mod** as soon as containers/common#753 is merged.
could you split the common upgrade to a different commit?
